# Assets Management

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:cbdd7ca847c2cc85ed8dd7a7dbc703f90a013c6247324351452de175781e983b
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This Module manages the assets owned by a company. It will keep
track of depreciation's occurred on those assets. And it allows to create
accounting entries from the depreciation lines.

The full asset life-cycle is managed (from asset creation to asset removal).

Assets can be created manually as well as automatically
(via the creation of an accounting entry on the asset account).

The module contains a large number of functional enhancements compared to
the standard account_asset module from Odoo.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

It is recommended to configure your Purchase Journal with "Group Invoice Lines" to avoid the
creation of separate assets per Supplier Invoice Line.

## Usage

The module in NOT compatible with the standard account_asset module.

## Changelog

### 12.0.2.1.0 (2019-10-21)

- [IMP] Add option to calculate depreciation table by days

### 12.0.1.0.0 (2019-01-13)

- [BREAKING] account.asset: parent_path has replaced parent_left & parent_right (TODO: migration script)
- [BREAKING] account.asset.recompute.trigger: depends on date_range.py (TODO: re-implement in account_fiscal_year.py)

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-financial-tools/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-financial-tools/issues/new?body=module:%20account_asset_management%0Aversion:%2012.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.wizard.account_asset_remove.AccountAssetRemove._prepare_early_removal
documentation: Generate last depreciation entry on the day before the removal date.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset_line.AccountAssetLine._setup_move_line_data
documentation: Prepare data to be propagated to account.move.line

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset_profile.AccountAssetProfile._selection_method_time
documentation:
Install the 'account_asset_management_method_number_end' to enable the
'Number' and 'End' Time Methods.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.2.0.0.pre-migration.move_view_assets
documentation:
Copy view assets to other table for preserving them, but outside of the
main table, so remove them from there.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.pre-migration.handle_account_asset_disposal_migration
documentation:
Take care of potentially installed `account_asset_disposal` module.

In this phase we rename stuff for adapting to the new data structure.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.post-migration.adjust_asset_values
documentation:
Avoid method_time != 'year' when possible + adjust other values
in assets and asset profiles.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.post-migration.set_asset_line_previous
documentation:
Set pointer to the previous depreciation line on each asset line.
This must be executed before `add_asset_initial_entry` for being
populated correctly.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.post-migration.add_asset_initial_entry
documentation:
On OCA module, an initial depreciation line is created as summary of the
asset. We recreate that line here for the old assets.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.post-migration.handle_account_asset_disposal_migration
documentation:
Take care of potentially installed `account_asset_disposal` module.

In this phase we set the last asset line to the type remove on the
corresponding assets.

functions.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.migrations.12.0.1.0.0.post-migration.link_asset_line_with_move_when_type_create
documentation: move_id field should be set when type = create

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.tests.test_asset_management_xls.TestAssetManagementXls.test_01_action_xls
documentation: Check report XLS action and generate report

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_fy_duration
documentation:
Returns fiscal year duration.

@param option:
- days: duration in days
- months: duration in months,
          a started month is counted as a full month
- years: duration in calendar years, considering also leap years

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_fy_duration_factor
documentation:
localization: override this method to change the logic used to
calculate the impact of extended/shortened fiscal years

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_depreciation_start_date
documentation:
In case of 'Linear': the first month is counted as a full month
if the fiscal year starts in the middle of a month.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_first_period_amount
documentation:
Return prorata amount for Time Method 'Year' in case of
'Prorata Temporis'

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_amount_linear
documentation:
Override this method if you want to compute differently the
yearly amount.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._compute_year_amount
documentation:
Localization: override this method to change the degressive-linear
calculation logic according to local legislation.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._compute_line_dates
documentation:
The posting dates of the accounting entries depend on the
chosen 'Period Length' as follows:
- month: last day of the month
- quarter: last of the quarter
- year: last day of the fiscal year

Override this method if another posting date logic is required.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_fy_info
documentation: Return an homogeneus data structure for fiscal years.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_asset_management.models.account_asset.AccountAsset._get_depreciation_entry_name
documentation: use this method to customise the name of the accounting entry
